agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Manage enrolled Macs and durable jobs from one control plane.
agents.enrollmentDescription: Run this on the Mac after installing mac-control-agent. The Mac connects outbound; it does not open a listening port.
agents.emptyDescription: Create an enrollment command to pair your first Mac.
